title: Ashenfall
description: Turning Minecraft into a crazy RPG, where you can upgrade with skills, conquer dungeons, slay bosses and so much more
body:
# ☁️ Ashenfall – A Soulslike Sandbox RPG Modpack

> **No story. No destiny. Only ash—and the strength to rise through it.**

---

## 🧱 Overview

**Ashenfall** transforms Minecraft into a dark, punishing, and immersive RPG experience inspired by soulslike design. There’s no main quest. No hand-holding. Just a world decayed by time—and the relentless grind to survive and grow stronger.

If you’re here for lighthearted adventures, turn back now.  
If you're ready to suffer, adapt, and overcome, *welcome to Ashenfall*.

---

## ⚔️ Features

- **🗡️ Tactical, stamina-based combat**  
  Combat is slow, deliberate, and unforgiving. Learn your timing—or die learning it.

- **🌿 Skill-based progression**  
  No forced classes. Customize your build through deep skill trees and organic growth.

- **🗺️ Exploration that matters**  
  Discover lost fortresses, ancient catacombs, and corrupted lands filled with risk and reward.

- **💀 Challenging enemies & custom bosses**  
  No level-scaling. No mercy. Every fight tests your skill and patience.

- **🔎 Hidden depth, minimal direction**  
  Uncover mechanics, secrets, and systems through exploration and experimentation.

---

## 🛠️ Modpack Focus

Ashenfall leans heavily into:
- Dark fantasy aesthetics
- Soulslike combat and world design
- RPG mechanics with a sandbox structure
- Exploration-driven progression
- Intense atmosphere and immersive gameplay

This modpack is not meant to be easy.  
It's meant to be earned.

---

## 🎮 Installation

1. Install the latest version of [**<Your Chosen Launcher>**].
2. Download **Ashenfall** and import it.
3. Allocate at least **6-8 GB RAM**.
4. Launch. Suffer. Adapt. Ascend.

---
